name: conducty-codex
description: Conducty-style orchestration for Codex: kernel state contracts, appetite planning, tracer-first execution, vault notes, prompt logs, and improvement loops.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, execute, verify, and improve with a Conducty vault.
interface.longDescription: Adds Conducty's orchestration loop to Codex through a skill plus a local MCP server. The server initializes the vault, assesses kernel state, scores risk, routes the next skill, writes durable kernel contracts, writes plan notes, checks prompt quality, logs prompt outcomes, records checkpoints, captures improvement kata notes, creates pre-merge ship reports, and audits vault graph health so orchestration state becomes durable instead of living only in chat.
defaultPrompt: Assess this work with the Conducty kernel.
Log this prompt outcome to Conducty.
